untranslatable_reason: Signal requires Rate of Change (ROC) indicator which is not in the allowed indicators list. ROC(5) and ROC(252) are standard technical indicators but not available. The 'consecutive_days_requirement': 2 parameter also cannot be directly expressed in the single-bar condition structure without multi-bar lookback logic not supported by the schema.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_9 signal requires ROC (Rate of Change) calculations over 5-day and 252-day periods with a 2-day persistence check. These indicators are not available in the allowed set. The allowed indicators do not include ROC, momentum, or multi-period comparison operators. To properly implement this signal, ROC indicators would need to be added to the allowed indicators list, and the engine would need to support multi-bar state tracking for the consecutive days requirement.
